description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the chilio/laravel-dusk-ci:php-8.2 Docker image with a mysql:5.7 service and a single test stage. Define DB_CONNECTION, DB_HOST, MYSQL_DATABASE, MYSQL_PASSWORD, MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD, and MYSQL_USER variables for the MySQL service. Add a browser_test job in the test stage that runs apt-get update && apt-get install -y php8.2-mailparse, copies .env.dusk.ci to .env, executes composer install, configure-laravel, start-nginx-ci-project, php artisan mailcare:email-receive tests/storage/email_with_attachment.eml, chmod -R 777 storage/app/emails/, and php artisan dusk --colors --env=dusk.ci, and always stores ./storage/logs, ./tests/Browser/screenshots, and ./tests/Browser/console as artifacts for 7 days. Add a test_coding_standard job in the test stage that runs apt-get update && apt-get install -y php8.2-mailparse, copies .env.example to .env, runs composer install, and runs vendor/bin/phpcs . with ignore patterns and the PSR2 standard. Add a test_coverage job in the test stage that runs apt-get update && apt-get install -y php8.2-mailparse, copies .env.example to .env, runs composer install, php artisan key:generate, and vendor/bin/phpunit --coverage-text --colors=never. Add a unit_test job in the test stage that runs apt-get update && apt-get install -y php8.2-mailparse, copies .env.example to .env, runs composer install, php artisan key:generate, and vendor/bin/phpunit.
